steps.title: Identify what effectively emphasizes size
steps.content: To truly “emphasize the size of the sculpture,” generic descriptors aren't enough. The notes provide the concrete, powerful detail: Cycle is “roughly 62 feet wide and 56 feet tall.” Numbers are what make scale vivid.

steps.title: Find the choice with those measurements
steps.content: Choice B includes both specific measurements and uses “stretches” to convey spatial extent. The others either describe the sculpture generically or emphasize materials, none providing the concrete dimensions essential for emphasizing scale. That matches choice B — B is correct.
